themes.label: Kingdom
themes.summary: This chapter stresses reign, kingdom, throne, rule, or the authority of God and His Christ. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 21 verses. Commentary leans on "The king of Jericho, one; the king of Ai, which is beside Beth-el, one —The catalog begins wi...". Cross references echo "Kingdom".

1: Now these are the kings of the land
7: And these are the kings of the country which Joshua and the children of Israel smote on this side Jordan on the west
